Name: ITEM_PARAM
Description: Defines general item properties, including visuals, effects, linked equipment or spell data, inventory behavior, pricing, and usage settings.

Fields.Name: Item Icon ID
Fields.Description: ID of the icon displayed for the item in menus and inventory screens.

Fields.Name: Special Effect ID
Fields.Description: ID of the special effect applied when the item is used or equipped.

Fields.Name: Item Start SFX ID
Fields.Description: Visual or sound effect played when item usage begins.

Fields.Name: Item Activation SFX ID
Fields.Description: Visual or sound effect played during item activation.

Fields.Name: Item Effect SFX ID
Fields.Description: Visual or sound effect associated with the item's resulting effect.

Fields.Name: Weapon ID
Fields.Description: Linked weapon parameter ID if the item represents a weapon.

Fields.Name: Armor ID
Fields.Description: Linked armor parameter ID if the item represents armor.

Fields.Name: Arrow ID
Fields.Description: Linked arrow or projectile parameter ID.

Fields.Name: Ring ID
Fields.Description: Linked ring or accessory parameter ID.

Fields.Name: Spell ID
Fields.Description: Linked spell or magic parameter ID.

Fields.Name: Gesture ID
Fields.Description: Gesture unlocked or associated with this item.

Fields.Name: Default Sort ID
Fields.Description: Default sorting order used in menus and inventory.

Fields.Name: Base Purchase Price
Fields.Description: Default shop purchase price of the item.

Fields.Name: Base Sell Price
Fields.Description: Default amount received when selling the item.

Fields.Name: Item Use Animation Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to the animation speed when using the item.

Fields.Name: Weight (kg)
Fields.Description: Weight value of the item used for equipment load calculations.

Fields.Name: Item Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the general category or type of item.

Fields.Name: Usage Type
Fields.Description: Defines how the item is used or activated.

Fields.Name: Acquisition Flag
Fields.Description: Flag set when the item has been obtained.

Fields.Name: Maximum Stack Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of this item that can be stored in a single inventory slot.

Fields.Name: Special Effect Category
Fields.Description: Category used for managing or grouping special effects.

Fields.Name: Special Effect Duplication Rule
Fields.Description: Determines whether this item's special effect can stack with similar effects.

Fields.Name: Effect SFX Priority
Fields.Description: Priority level of the item's effect visual or sound effect.

Fields.Name: Menu Icon Category
Fields.Description: Icon category used for menu grouping and display.

Fields.Name: Enchant Permission
Fields.Description: Determines whether the item can receive enchantments or buffs.

Fields.Name: Collection Trophy Type
Fields.Description: Associated achievement or collection trophy category.

Fields.Name: One Per Save
Fields.Description: If enabled, only one copy of this item can exist per save file.

Fields.Name: One Per Playthrough
Fields.Description: If enabled, only one copy of this item can be obtained per game cycle.

Fields.Name: Carry Over to NG+
Fields.Description: Determines whether the item is retained when starting a new game cycle.

Fields.Name: Obtainable via Debug All Items
Fields.Description: Determines whether the item is included when using debug commands to obtain all items.
